query: UPDATE users SET role = 'admin_master' WHERE openId = (SELECT VARIABLE_VALUE FROM (SELECT 'OWNER_OPEN_ID' as VARIABLE_NAME, openId as VARIABLE_VALUE FROM users ORDER BY createdAt ASC LIMIT 1) t); SELECT id, name, role, openId FROM users ORDER BY createdAt ASC LIMIT 5;
